goal: Extract and reconcile the FULL WBG token set from The Loop — Main Library into OutSystems dist/theme.css (Phase 0), file token-drift findings, then PAUSE for brand-owner sign-off.
pause_reason: after_tokens checkpoint = pause; awaiting designer/brand-owner sign-off on tokens + findings before building components.

project.note: gh not authenticated this run; project board not yet created/linked

caps.budget_note: raise/lower for library-scale runs; a full library is hundreds of items

token_count_note: color +15 vs prior run: added the missing Outline/On Dark State+Link group to semantic-colors.css (node 11122-2879); semantic roles now reference primitives via var() per hard rule #3.
items_note: Component tiers (primitives/composites/patterns) NOT yet audited — only token frames were exposed in the file this run. Audit them after the tokens checkpoint sign-off.

findings.summary: Foreign token systems leaked into WBG library
Orphan semantic tokens with no primitive (4)
Green/Yellow mixed step naming ($lift-core base/on-dark vs numeric)
Blue/40 #169af3 = 3.02:1 on white; fails normal-text AA when used as interactive/link text

handover_note: build:theme (lightningcss --targets '>= 0.25%') panics in this env (lightningcss 1.0.0-alpha.71); build:theme:dev works. Fix the targets flag before handover. dist/theme.css built via dev script.

consistency_passes.note: Semantic roles reference primitives via var() (hard rule #3); only 4 flagged orphans + transparent kept literal. Divergences captured as FND-001..011 (incl. a11y contrast FND-011, Indigo ramp inversion FND-009). All 57 var() refs resolve to defined primitives.
